title: Dispatch Operations Dashboard
meeting_summary: A regional logistics company needs a dispatch dashboard to assign drivers, track deliveries in real time, and generate daily performance reports. The system must integrate with their existing fleet API and support dispatcher and manager roles.
estimation_markdown:
## Investment Summary: Dispatch Operations Dashboard (Executive View — v2)

We propose building a real-time dispatch operations platform that eliminates manual driver assignment and delivery tracking across your logistics network. The current process costs an estimated 8 dispatcher-hours per day in coordination overhead. The new system replaces this with an automated dashboard accessible to all dispatchers and managers. Total investment: **17,000 EUR** over **12 weeks**.

### Key Deliverables

- Real-time dispatch dashboard: assign drivers and monitor deliveries live
- Automated daily performance reports delivered to management by 08:00
- Seamless integration with your existing fleet tracking system
- Role-based views: operational (dispatcher) and strategic (manager)
- Production-ready platform with monitoring, backups, and handover documentation

### Timeline

Go-live in **12 weeks** from kick-off. The only external dependency is fleet system access credentials, which must be provided by the end of week 2.

### Business Risks

- **Fleet system dependency (HIGH):** If the fleet API provider delays access beyond week 2, the go-live date shifts by an equivalent number of weeks.
- **Scope expansion (MEDIUM):** Additional report types or integrations requested after week 4 will require a change request and additional budget.
- **Change management (LOW):** Dispatcher adoption requires a half-day training session; budget and scheduling should be confirmed before go-live.

### Indicative ROI

Reducing manual coordination by 2 hours/day per dispatcher (4 dispatchers, EUR 35/h blended rate) yields **EUR 1,120/month** in recovered capacity. At this rate, the investment pays back in **under 16 months**. If late deliveries are reduced by 15%, logistics SLA penalties avoided add further upside.

### Recommended Next Step

Approve the budget and schedule a kick-off workshop. Confirm fleet API access with your operations team before the engagement starts.

### Confidence Level

**Medium** — Business requirements are well understood. ROI projection assumes current dispatcher count and rate; actual payback may vary if team size or rates differ.

title: HR Employee Onboarding Portal
meeting_summary: An HR department needs an internal web portal to automate the onboarding of new hires. The portal should manage document collection, task assignments, and integrate with their Active Directory for SSO and Slack for notifications.
estimation_markdown:
## Investment Summary: HR Employee Onboarding Portal (Executive View — v2)

We propose building an automated onboarding portal that replaces the current manual HR intake process — eliminating the 3–4 hours of coordination per new hire currently spent across HR, IT, and hiring managers. The system will guide new hires through document submission, automatically assign onboarding tasks to the right teams, and notify stakeholders via Slack. Total investment: **14,250 EUR** over **9 weeks**.

### Key Deliverables

- Self-service onboarding portal for new hires: guided, digital, paperless
- Automated task routing to HR, IT, and hiring manager on each new hire
- Single sign-on via your existing Active Directory — no new credentials
- Real-time Slack notifications for milestones and overdue tasks
- HR admin dashboard with live onboarding status and completion tracking

### Timeline

Go-live in **9 weeks** from kick-off. IT must provide Active Directory access credentials by week 2.

### Business Risks

- **IT dependency (MEDIUM):** An IT security review of the Active Directory integration could add up to one week if not prioritised.
- **Scope (MEDIUM):** E-signature for documents was mentioned informally. If required, it adds approximately EUR 1,875 and one week — confirm before kick-off.
- **Adoption (LOW):** New-hire experience quality depends on HR completing content setup (welcome messages, task templates) before go-live.

### Indicative ROI

At 20 new hires per month and 3 hours saved per hire (EUR 40/h blended HR rate), the portal recovers **EUR 2,400/month** in HR coordination time. Payback is achieved in **under 6 months**.

### Recommended Next Step

Approve the budget and confirm with IT the timeline for Active Directory access. Clarify e-signature scope before the kick-off workshop.

### Confidence Level

**High** — Business requirements are clear and the technology integrations are well-understood. Main variable is the e-signature scope decision.
